---
title: "Soundarya Chidambaram"
image: Chidambaram018.jpg
subtitle: "Don't forget to check out my blog 'Sandy GPT'"
about: 
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Bucknell University
      href: https://www.bucknell.edu/fac-staff/soundarya-chidambaram
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/soundaryacBU

page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

Welcome to my homepage!

I am an Associate Professor of Political Science at Bucknell University.
